gpt_review.biasedText: GET TODAY NEWSMAX+: NEWSMAX is the fastest-growing cable news channel in America with more than 30 million people watching! Reuters Institute reports NEWSMAX is one of the top news brands in the U.S. You need to watch NEWSMAX today. Get it with great shows from Rob Schmitt, Greta Van Susteren, Greg Kelly, Carl Higbie, Rob Finnerty – and many more! Find the NEWSMAX channel on your cable system – Go Here Now BEST OFFER: Sign up for NEWSMAX+ and get NEWSMAX, our streaming channel NEWSMAX2 and our military channel World at War. gpt_review.reason: The cited passage is promotional advertising that uses bandwagon appeals, subjective hype, and unsubstantiated superlatives. However, it does not frame an elite-versus-ordinary-people dichotomy. The bias present is of other types (e.g., unsubstantiated claims, opinion-as-fact, subjective qualifiers), not “elite vs. populist.”

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: Polling analyst Patrick Allocco told Newsmax on Monday that despite wide disparities in early surveys on U.S. airstrikes against Iran, he sees little evidence of Republican voters breaking with President Donald Trump.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Article relies exclusively on one analyst’s framing without countervailing expert views or broader context that might challenge his interpretation.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: GET TODAY NEWSMAX+: NEWSMAX is the fastest-growing cable news channel in America with more than 30 million people watching!
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Presents superlatives and audience size as facts without sourcing, time frame, or methodology.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: You need to watch NEWSMAX today.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Imperative promotional opinion framed as necessity by the outlet, not marked as opinion.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: Get it with great shows from Rob Schmitt, Greta Van Susteren, Greg Kelly, Carl Higbie, Rob Finnerty – and many more!
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Uses subjective praise (“great”) and hype inappropriate to neutral news reporting.

gpt_false_negatives.biasedText: Polling analyst Patrick Allocco told Newsmax on Monday that despite wide disparities in early surveys on U.S. airstrikes against Iran, he sees little evidence of Republican voters breaking with President Donald Trump.
gpt_false_negatives.reason: No acknowledgment of alternative analysts or countervailing perspectives; relies solely on one source’s interpretation.
